duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(4,6): error TS2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.

duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(5,12): error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(5,12): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'y'.

duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(5,15): error TS2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.


==== duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua (13 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/4130
    
    class C {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'C'.
      y: number = 2;
      ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
      ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'y'.
       ~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
         ~~~~~~
!!! error TS2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
      accessor y: number = 3;
      ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
               ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
               ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'y'.
                ~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                  ~~~~~~
!!! error TS2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
    }
